name: Tom Wolf
subject: stand with me today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Hello --

When people can come together and organize, all of us benefit.

But when workers are silenced, families pay the price and the economy becomes more rigged for the rich and powerful.

Politicians like my opponent, Scott Wagner, believe they can use Supreme Court decisions that restrict workers' rights as a springboard to silence workers. We need to set them straight by showing that Pennsylvanians support unions and will fight to defend their brothers and sisters in labor.

**[I'm proud to say, "I stand with workers and unions, and I'll fight to defend their right to organize." If you agree, will you add your name next to mine?](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec378/73a2bc12/3881c519/1fcde9d0/1136243878/VEsH/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/add-your-name-if-you-stand-with-workers?gpsid=8_50_1836&source=em18_180705_unions_adv_gq_ful__TW_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180705_unions_adv_gq_ful__TW_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&utm_content=1+-+Im+proud+to+say+I+stand+with+workers+and")** | | [SIGN THE PETITION ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec378/73a2bc12/3881c519/1fcde9d7/1136243878/VEsE/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/add-your-name-if-you-stand-with-workers?gpsid=8_50_1836&source=em18_180705_unions_adv_gq_ful__TW_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180705_unions_adv_gq_ful__TW_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&utm_content=2+-+SIGN+THE+PETITION+nbsprarr")
---
The Supreme Court's recent decision in the _Janus_ case is a major step backward for working families and the middle class.

For generations, unions in our country have fought for and won protections we all enjoy, including the 40-hour work week, weekends, paid time off, and improved conditions for those who are trying to make ends meet.

Now workers and their unions are under attack on a level we haven't seen in decades -- and we know that as governor, Scott Wagner would roll back workers' rights even further.

I will do everything I can to stop attacks on workers, to stand with unions and continue to create good-paying jobs that grow our economy. But I need you to help me show that I'm not standing alone.

**If you're ready to stand with me and fight for Pennsylvania workers, add your name. Tell Scott Wagner and anti-worker extremists that you're ready to fight for workers' rights:**

**[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/defend-workers-rights](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec378/73a2bc12/3881c519/1fcde9d6/1136243878/VEsF/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/add-your-name-if-you-stand-with-workers?gpsid=8_50_1836&source=em18_180705_unions_adv_gq_ful__TW_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180705_unions_adv_gq_ful__TW_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&utm_content=3+-+httpssecurewolfforpacomdefendworkersrigh")**

Thanks for taking a stand,

Tom

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: The next Supreme Court justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

Today President Trump is expected to announce his nominee to replace Justice Anthony Kennedy on the Supreme Court.

Over the last few decades the Court has made decisions about who you can marry, where you can go to school, and what protections you have at work. My grandpa was a miner who worked 1,500 feet underground and Court decisions made his workplace safer.

**Our highest Court is too important -- the next Supreme Court justice needs to be someone who will respect precedent and the rule of law, not someone who will vote solely on the basis of ideology.**

In the coming years, the Court may hear high-stakes cases that determine whether or not insurance companies can deny coverage to people who have pre-existing conditions, or whether our Constitution protects women's reproductive rights.

**Together we need to raise our voices and get the word out so that the Senate rejects any ideological candidate as Justice Kennedy 's replacement.
**
Thanks,

Amy

name: The White House
subject: Our next Supreme Court justice
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=79334b3686ab3118a5270e76af17d5f8795dba04f8cbcec209a9751fc81942185579ced1ca8c127f9eca104b26a1dc78182734b65ce6d1be) The White House • July 9, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump will announce his nominee to be the next Associate Justice of the Supreme Court tonight at 9 p.m. ET. [Watch live. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=79334b3686ab3118b31da0b215d9c154127b8bc77c4584730b1ab24fb64480ad07df56c7f00d282c10c3ac2ffa08e686c3f93fe69a74a7b0) |
---
|

## Our next Supreme Court justice
**Justice Anthony M. Kennedy** announced on June 27 that he would retire from the U.S. Supreme Court at the end of this month. Tonight, President Trump will be joined by Vice President Mike Pence and senior leaders from Congress as he announces his nominee to be our Nation’s 114th Supreme Court Justice.
**In his first year, President Trump appointed a record number** of Federal judges, each of whom is standing up for our rights. That record includes the confirmation of Justice Neil Gorsuch to the Supreme Court last year. In just a little more than a year on the bench, Justice Gorsuch has proven to be a crucial voice for restoring Constitutional principles to our government.
**By appointing rule-of-law judges** , President Trump has reshaped the judiciary. That work goes hand-in-hand with the President’s program to reduce the size and scope of government, which includes signing the largest tax cuts in history, implementing unprecedented regulatory reform, and promoting individual liberties and religious freedoms.
[Watch the President’s Supreme Court announcement at 9 p.m. ET.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=79334b3686ab3118b31da0b215d9c154127b8bc77c4584730b1ab24fb64480ad07df56c7f00d282c10c3ac2ffa08e686c3f93fe69a74a7b0)
**Stay in-the-know** : [Sign up for updates about President Trump’s nominee. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=79334b3686ab311879120651cdb991df2f4b8191ea047ea57c1fde249a94d11f82b78663bb5c670f00ff83dc0994b698f9d7370c430e430a)

---
|

## The President’s message to those defending our borders
**On Friday, Vice President Pence** visited U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement Headquarters to deliver a message from President Trump. “I bring greetings this morning from a great champion of law and order. And as he reminded and wanted me to convey today, a leader who stands without apology with the men and women of ICE and law enforcement at every level.”
**In recent weeks, leading Democrats have called for the abolition of ICE**. “In this White House, let me be clear: We are with you 100 percent,” the Vice President said. Eliminating ICE would grind immigration enforcement to a halt, with devastating consequences for public safety. These calls are an insult to the heroic law enforcement officers who protect us from drug dealers, gang members, and other criminals that exploit our porous immigration laws.
[See photos from Vice President Pence’s visit with ICE.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=79334b3686ab3118a5eb374115b832f67af292bb4f1d3504ddedd9b9327312f27914b1ad663c53ef33027415180bcf088d4f6e1da0a35520)

clean_body: Your 1600 Daily: | | The White House • July 9, 2018 The Day Ahead President Donald J. Trump will announce his nominee to be the next Associate Justice of the Supreme Court tonight at 9 p.m. ET. | | Our next Supreme Court justice Justice Anthony M. Kennedy announced on June 27 that he would retire from the U.S. Supreme Court at the end of this month. Tonight, President Trump will be joined by Vice President Mike Pence and senior leaders from Congress as he announces his nominee to be our Nation’s 114th Supreme Court Justice. In his first year, President Trump appointed a record number of Federal judges, each of whom is standing up for our rights. That record includes the confirmation of Justice Neil Gorsuch to the Supreme Court last year. In just a little more than a year on the bench, Justice Gorsuch has proven to be a crucial voice for restoring Constitutional principles to our government. By appointing rule-of-law judges , President Trump has reshaped the judiciary. That work goes hand-in-hand with the President’s program to reduce the size and scope of government, which includes signing the largest tax cuts in history, implementing unprecedented regulatory reform, and promoting individual liberties and religious freedoms. Stay in-the-know : | The President’s message to those defending our borders On Friday, Vice President Pence visited U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement Headquarters to deliver a message from President Trump. “I bring greetings this morning from a great champion of law and order. And as he reminded and wanted me to convey today, a leader who stands without apology with the men and women of ICE and law enforcement at every level.” In recent weeks, leading Democrats have called for the abolition of ICE. “In this White House, let me be clear: We are with you 100 percent,” the Vice President said. Eliminating ICE would grind immigration enforcement to a halt, with devastating consequences for public safety. These calls are an insult to the heroic law enforcement officers who protect us from drug dealers, gang members, and other criminals that exploit our porous immigration laws. More : | Photo of the Day Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks Vice President Mike Pence and Secretary of the Department of Homeland Security Kirstjen Nielsen at the ICE Headquarters in Washington, DC | July 6, 2018 | |

President Trump will be unveiling his Supreme Court nominee today, and we know one thing for sure: This individual could have the power to overturn Roe v. Wade. ---------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek -

President Trump will be unveiling his Supreme Court nominee today, and we know one thing for sure: **This individual could have the power to overturn Roe v. Wade.**

A woman's freedom to make her own health care decisions is deeply important to equality in this country.

A major value of my campaign is that we trust and support women. I am proud to stand with organizations that give women the information and resources they need to be healthy and independent.

**And just last week, I was honored to receive the endorsement of the Planned Parenthood Action Fund.**

Fighting for organizations like Planned Parenthood to keep their funding and fighting back against attempts to take away a woman's constitutional rights are some of the most important things we can be doing right now.

[So I need you with me, Derek. I'm collecting signatures for a petition that urges Congress to take action in any way possible to protect a woman's right to make her own choices. Please sign here.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1271/3e0906/6851610e/3e359958/4167548720/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/scotus-planned-parenthood?source=20180709_1_PET_TK_SCOTUS-PP&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+So+I+need+you+with+me+if+recipientfirstn&utm_campaign=20180709_1_PET_TK_SCOTUS-PP")

We cannot afford to be silent.

In the coming months, we need to protect the organizations and individuals most vulnerable to the disastrous changes this administration will try to make.

Sign my petition today to say you're standing with women, Planned Parenthood, and Democrats in Congress who will fight this every step of the way.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1271/3e0906/6851610e/3e35995f/4167548720/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/scotus-planned-parenthood?source=20180709_1_PET_TK_SCOTUS-PP&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Please++if+recipientfirstname++recipient&utm_campaign=20180709_1_PET_TK_SCOTUS-PP")

| | Friends,

Last week I welcomed House Agriculture Committee Chairman Mike Conaway (R-TX) for a southeast Alabama agriculture tour. It was a great visit!

We started the day by talking to more than 100 farmers and those in the agriculture industry in Pike County. We had a productive discussion about aspects of the new farm bill that will soon be sent to President Trump's desk. Then, we had lunch at the Alabama Peanut Producers Association in Houston County and visited two family farms in Coffee and Geneva counties to learn more about their work and crops.

It was a **_big deal_** to have the Ag Chairman here in our district to answer questions and meet face-to-face with so many hardworking farmers. I'll continue to work with Chairman Conaway to fight for fair treatment of our Alabama commodities as we work to deliver the new farm bill.

I'm grateful to have the strong support of Chairman Conaway and the endorsement of ALFA in my campaign for reelection, and I hope you'll take a few minutes to **read and share some of the press coverag e** of this exciting day in the Wiregrass.

\- Martha

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Crli1NiFF-07uvnaLaNbcrnmIvJeistV1E_7Qfo7wrk=/hM59fMpAvo7w0Nyj_MXUnPl6kVNdZW82wIMweKBWCho=?refcode=MT_EM_SV_WL_180709_1_1&amount=20&recurring=true)

Peter, last week's news of Kennedy retiring shocked us all. Now with Kennedy gone, Trump has the power to appoint a justice -- giving us the first conservative-leaning Court in decades.

This means that the issues that matter to us -- like the decision of _Roe v. Wade_ , campaign finance reform, and even gay marriage -- are under a conservative threat.

Just two years ago, Mitch McConnell said the American people should have a voice when it came to appointing Merrick Garland. McConnell believed then that justices should wait to be appointed until after the elections. So, shouldn't we follow that same philosophy now?

| **Peter, we want to hear from you. Do you believe we should wait until after the midterm elections for President Trump to appoint a judge?** | [YES](https://act.myngp.com/el/Crli1NiFF-07uvnaLaNbcrnmIvJeistV1E_7Qfo7wrk=/hM59fMpAvo7w0Nyj_MXUnPl6kVNdZW82wIMweKBWCho=?refcode=MT_EM_SV_WL_180709_1_1_YES&amount=20&recurring=true) | [NO](https://act.myngp.com/el/Crli1NiFF-07uvnaLaNbcrnmIvJeistV1E_7Qfo7wrk=/hM59fMpAvo7w0Nyj_MXUnPl6kVNdZW82wIMweKBWCho=?refcode=MT_EM_SV_WL_180709_1_1_NO&amount=20&recurring=true)
---|---

Thank you,

Mike

One news organization called it the "shadiest Super PAC move ever" -- and that's a tough title to earn. Ohio First Super PAC spent nearly half a million dollars before the primary election without disclosing to the FEC that they were spending money on Renacci's behalf. **That means Ohio voters cast their primary ballots without knowing this group was trying to influence their votes.** We know about the spending now. But we still don't know the whole picture. This Super PAC still hasn't disclosed their donors, so we don't know who they're getting their money from. So who knows which big-money GOP donors are trying to buy this race for Renacci. _Citizens United_ paved the way for the creation of Super PACs -- and these are the consequences. Our elections are absolutely flooded with special interest cash. Super PACs use their money to influence voters and get their allies elected. Once their allies are in Congress, they vote for things like the anti-worker GOP tax scam, repeal of the Affordable Care Act, or the end of Medicare as we know it. The only way to effectively fight against it is with strong grassroots support. [**Our Rapid Response deadline is in about 15 hours. If you could rush in a contribution -- possibly even matching our $26 average online contribution, I'd really appreciate it.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9bc/4462dc26/55e6eb07/2007955e/3769585058/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzA5IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6ImIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180709?refcode=sbe180709_b_other&refcode2=3268183") I'm still confident we can reverse _Citizens United_ and get all this special interest cash out of politics. But until that day comes, I hope you will continue fighting beside me. With gratitude, Sherrod

subject: Celebrating America's independence across the 3rd District
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friends, Team Banks has had a busy week celebrating America's independence all across the 3rd District!

On the Fourth of July, our team joined with Senator Sue Glick as we walked in the 26th Annual Garrett Heritage Days Parade in Garrett. Team Banks was also represented all throughout the district on Independence Day as we walked in parades in Angola, Portland and Topeka. It was great to see so many amazing volunteers coming out on a hot summer day to show their support! This weekend, we made a stop at 9th Annual Angola Balloons Aloft in Angola. On Sunday, our team ended the festive weekend walking in the Kosiosko County 4-H parade with Congressman Banks. It was a great time for everyone who attended! If you haven't already, we would love for you to join Team Banks today. We will be attending many more fun parades and events throughout the rest of the summer, so don't miss out! \- Team Banks

name: Osmack for Missouri
subject: Trump's SCOTUS pick could set us back 40 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Osmack for Missouri
body:
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ozALGNKFPFtsE99RSf8K9bUCaDOaYoFlUdF4_GzBBY=/CYgSkVJDgoFFBZu2qDLyb1SqjVVNe5VxA3iEV5W4xow=) Friends, President Trump is set to announce his nominee to replace Justice Kennedy on the Supreme Court tonight. The nomination could tip the Court towards a firm conservative majority for the first time since the New Deal. It also puts reproductive rights in grave danger. All of Trump's nominees have used coded language that groups like Planned Parenthood identify as red flags for overturning the landmark Roe v. Wade. Overturning Roe would criminalize and punish women seeking an abortion, and would simply endanger reproductive health. We can't afford to be set back forty years. We must aggressively renew our fight for reproductive rights. Equality must include equal access to contraception, equal access to reproductive healthcare, and equal choice over when, how, and if someone chooses to start a family. We've seen the consequences of restrictive abortion policies-- this is an issue that can have life or death effects. **I pledge to stand firmly with those already fighting for these principles, and I invite you to join us:** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ozALGNKFPFtsE99RSf8K9bUCaDOaYoFlUdF4_GzBBY=/Jn8GAHht0y_GoAfy0AtG0sxaTG_UFS8sdt1KnjevyP4=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ozALGNKFPFtsE99RSf8K9bUCaDOaYoFlUdF4_GzBBY=/50WD8SyHJNqRMTUKAN-JM84s42BSmcruQtzXXzN2vME=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ozALGNKFPFtsE99RSf8K9bUCaDOaYoFlUdF4_GzBBY=/KfJ9_0ZADp9CLJIgkNmTMD5CZ5Q6vMPgdhG-DOuul6Q=) Overturning Roe v. Wade would be wrong. I pledge to protect and expand access to comprehensive reproductive healthcare. I pledge to advocate for policy that returns reproductive healthcare decisions to individuals and their doctors-- not to politicians. In Solidarity, Mark Osmack
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ozALGNKFPFtsE99RSf8K9bUCaDOaYoFlUdF4_GzBBY=/jH2UAqu9dWiwkCOZBwuRC3tCnFri8ArhUoEiLygzA5Q=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ozALGNKFPFtsE99RSf8K9bUCaDOaYoFlUdF4_GzBBY=/xADu0WvXIrkHhEPhDNIcqe5w9HOF1p4UmdQQzSVMlCM=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ozALGNKFPFtsE99RSf8K9bUCaDOaYoFlUdF4_GzBBY=/CC7Dp4lIxuhcnOAZZ93OMDJeaD16JJIlCbwp5nnDWUk=)

name: Heather Coil, AustinPetersen.com
subject: Campaign Update: RNC playing games, media, volunteers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hey Friend, here is the campaign update for the week! **RNC playing games - Bankrolling Hawley before the primary:** Last week, the Missouri GOP made the cowardly move and voted to allow the RNC to bankroll and spend money on behalf of Josh Hawley before the conclusion of the primary. [**You can read the full story in the Blaze by clicking here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.theblaze.com%2Fnews%2F2018%2F07%2F05%2Fmo-sen-rnc-to-start-spending-money-for-hawley-prior-to-primary%2Famp%3F__twitter_impression%3Dtrue&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=070918_update&n=1) It’s no secret that Josh Hawley is the GOP’s golden boy and handpicked candidate. Mitch McConnell started supporting Hawley when he first began his campaign. It is 100% unfair to the voters of Missouri for the state and national party to fund Josh Hawley before the primary. This is a totally outrageous move on the part of the RNC and Missouri GOP. However, we’ve known for a long time that the establishment was against us. We will overcome this challenge and we will defeat Josh Hawley. **Local media:** The media hits keeping rolling in. Check out Austin’s appearance on the McGraw show [**here**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3Dqapywl77Izc%26feature%3Dshare&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=070918_update&n=2). Austin also makes an appearance on John Burke’s show which you can watch [**here**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fjohnburk1775%2Fvideos%2F2085973868397655%2F%3Fhc_ref%3DARRQpZGaL82XSJ55P6VIC0DyxQwZmIa_EhAo7oQq6_ls69J6z0HuIoTCQGpXyfPHOO4&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=070918_update&n=3). They discuss the campaign, immigration, Claire McCaskill and Josh Hawley. Great way to catch up with everything going on in the campaign. **Need more volunteers:** We need more volunteers! We are less than one month away from the GOP primary and need to crank out more phone calls and knock on more doors. I love seeing how many more volunteers we have making calls each week. But it’s all on hands on deck until August 7th. Can you make a few calls? [**Please click here to volunteer.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/volunteer?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=070918_update&n=4) Thanks for all that you do. Heather Coil
Communications Director
Austin Petersen for U.S. Senate

---

([www.austinpetersen.com](http://www.austinpetersen.com/?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=070918_update&n=5))

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a686/7ab0e2c4/7fe7050f/349b9508/1216755635/VEsH/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/protect-roe-v-wade?source=OHQ07098A") Friend, This summer, the Supreme Court's overwhelmingly conservative decisions have taken us down a troubling path. They have turned a corner down a back alley. We can't ignore that. There were many incredibly harmful decisions, from voting rights to labor unions, but the most damaging was the decision by Justice Anthony Kennedy to retire from the court -- giving Donald Trump a second pick to the highest court in our nation. When it was announced, legendary Supreme Court reporter Jeffrey Toobin ominously predicted: "Abortion will be illegal in 20 states in 18 months." So where's Larry Hogan in this? **When asked last week what he thought of the future of the court, he flat-out refused to take a position.** [**Women and families can't afford for Governor Hogan to stay silent -- add your name to tell Larry Hogan to ensure Maryland's reproductive healthcare laws remain unchanged regardless of what happens on the Supreme Court.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a686/7ab0e2c4/7fe7050f/349b9508/1216755635/VEsE/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/protect-roe-v-wade?source=OHQ07098A") | [SIGN ON »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a686/7ab0e2c4/7fe7050f/349b9508/1216755635/VEsF/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/protect-roe-v-wade?source=OHQ07098A")
---
Donald Trump will be announcing his Supreme Court nominee tonight, and one thing is for sure: Given the chance, that nominee will unquestionably vote to overturn _Roe v. Wade_. And because conservative governors know it will be overturned, you'll start to see state after state ban abortion outright.
Marylanders overwhelmingly do not trust Donald Trump and Senate Republicans to choose a justice that reflects our state's values. Despite this, Larry Hogan wants to "wait and see" who the next nominee is.
But we can't ignore his own history either. Throughout his life, dating to at least just after he graduated from college, Larry Hogan has been a staunch and vocal opponent of abortion. In 1980, as an aide to his father who was Prince George's County Executive, it was Governor Hogan's idea for the county administration to issue an executive order barring all abortions in county hospitals, except those where the life of the mother was at risk -- even banning abortions in the cases of pregnancies resulting from rape or incest.
He'd have you believe this was years ago, and long in the past. But during a June 2014 interview on the Dan Rodricks Show, Governor Hogan answered a listener's question regarding his position on abortion by saying that he has "personally always been opposed to abortion."
Now, more than ever, governors need to protect and advocate for the people they represent. We know Donald Trump and congressional Republicans won't. We need Larry Hogan to reassure Marylanders that despite his own troubling views on women's reproductive health, he will have the courage to protect Maryland's values.
[**Make Larry Hogan listen: Add your name to demand that he stand with the women of this state by committing to protect Maryland's reproductive healthcare laws.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a686/7ab0e2c4/7fe7050f/349b9508/1216755635/VEsC/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/protect-roe-v-wade?source=OHQ07098A")
Thanks,
Susie

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Roe v. Wade [SCOTUS Action]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We must build up reproductive freedoms in the states before Trump's new Supreme Court nominee overturns Roe v. Wade.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd788e2/2f5ea88d/77eafa19/2cbc1191/1816077284/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-roe-wade?utm_source=ema_2018-07-09_roe-scotus&refcode=ema_2018-07-09_roe-scotus&utm_campaign=roe-scotus&utm_medium=ema") Friend, For once, I've got to admit President Trump is right. Did you see this headline? | **_The Wall Street Journal_** **"Trump Says Abortion Rights Could Be Decided by States"**
---
Here's why Trump is right: For the first time since _Roe v. Wade_ , we have an anti-choice president and an anti-choice Congress. And with Justice Kennedy's retirement, Trump has promised to nominate an anti-choice justice to the Supreme Court. All three branches of the federal government will be anti-choice.
**Friend, this leaves it up to us in the states to stand up for reproductive freedoms before it's too late. If we can't count on the Supreme Court to protect our freedoms, we must strengthen the pro-choice movement in our states.**
[**We're working hard here in Washington state to promote a pro-choice, progressive agenda and show the nation what is possible. Be a part of this work by contributing $5 right now.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd788e2/2f5ea88d/77eafa19/2cbc1191/1816077284/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-roe-wade?utm_source=ema_2018-07-09_roe-scotus&refcode=ema_2018-07-09_roe-scotus&utm_campaign=roe-scotus&utm_medium=ema")
This is truly a fight for the most basic of rights of every woman in this nation. Trump and his extremist allies in D.C. have launched an unprecedented crusade against a woman's right to choose.
Republicans from state legislatures across the country to Congress and the White House want to ban abortion and restrict access to birth control. And they're one vote on the Senate floor away from controlling the Supreme Court, pushing the door wide open to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and pass extreme anti-choice laws.
This is an important issue to me, friend, and I'm not going to back down. This year's _Reproductive Parity Act_ represents one example of how we're standing up for women here in Washington: We improved health care access for all Washington women and addressed disparities that negatively impacted reproductive health care outcomes for the most vulnerable.
Together, again and again, we're showing why elections matter -- here and nationally. We significantly expanded reproductive health care options at home because YOU turned out to vote for pro-choice leaders. It's a model that we must spread to other states.
[**With the federal government soon to be aligned against us, we must build on our successes here in Washington to keep our reproductive freedoms nationwide. Can you help me build up our pro-choice movement in the states to protect _Roe v. Wade_ , right now?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd788e2/2f5ea88d/77eafa19/2cbc1191/1816077284/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-roe-wade?utm_source=ema_2018-07-09_roe-scotus&refcode=ema_2018-07-09_roe-scotus&utm_campaign=roe-scotus&utm_medium=ema")
Thanks for acting -- we need everyone to come together now.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

Friend,

I promised you I would only appoint justices in the mold of the late, great Justice Antonin Scalia.

Today, I am once again fulfilling that promise by appointing a strong constitutionalist, the Honorable Brett M. Kavanaugh, to the Supreme Court.

Judge Kavanaugh will protect our religious liberties, uphold the rule of law, and interpret the Constitution as it was originally understood by our Founders.

Senate liberals know that we have the opportunity to reshape the Supreme Court for an entire GENERATION, and they are ready to obstruct and unleash a smear campaign against our nominee.

**Just like during Justice Gorsuch 's confirmation hearings, we need to remind Democrats to stop playing politics and to put America FIRST.

[Please sign our official petition telling the Liberal OBSTRUCTIONISTS to confirm Judge Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bc1f36546b57df2601a306df914460ca1441dde6ffbbacd2aca095b2434a31335cc5aa818635f444987f7f4a755e78e4bf8ae465f4d15e98)**

(Washington Times, 6/28/18)
We must stand strong against the dirty tactics coming our way. The fate of the Supreme Court -- and our Constitution -- hangs in the balance, and the Democrats will NOT give up easily.

**[Sign our official petition telling Liberal obstructionists to confirm Judge Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court NOW.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=bc1f36546b57df26db8655ee7eebe01234f09e53747499a1224701289c979acca28bf3b1a3a4a959cf7ea52bec25c2e0b8f9c40bc8d80908)**

body:

The nominee for Associate Justice of the United States Supreme Court

Brett M. Kavanaugh

Tonight, President Donald J. Trump announced his intent to nominate Judge
Brett M. Kavanaugh of the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit to fill the Supreme Court vacancy created by Justice Anthony Kennedy’s retirement.

The nomination of Judge Kavanaugh comes after a selection process marked by a historic degree of transparency, including the President’s public disclosure of a list of 25 highly qualified potential nominees for the Supreme Court.

name: Tim Ryan and Marcy Kaptur
subject: We're standing shoulder to shoulder with the labor movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Unions have always set the standards by which ALL workplaces operate. That's why the ruling in Janus v. AFSCME doesn't just hurt members of unions -- it hurts ALL of us. | |
---
Folks, Two weeks ago, the Supreme Court ruled 5-4 to devastate funding for the unions that represent teachers, police officers, and city and state employees. This is a result that corporate interests and right-wing billionaires have sought for decades. They know that unions are the core of the movement for economic justice -- that they are one of the last lines of defense against unbridled corporate greed. **Unions have always set the standards by which ALL workplaces operate. That's why the ruling in _Janus v. AFSCME _doesn't just hurt members of unions -- it hurts ALL of us.** [We're not backing down. As proud supporters of American teachers, first responders, and all public employees, we stand firmly on the side of workers against this latest attack. Sign on to join us: ](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92c3/5486deaa/29d84343/dcc6d2f/998203458/VEsH/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/sign-on-stand-up-for-workers-rights-?source=tr") [Add your name ->](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92c3/5486deaa/29d84343/dcc6d2f/998203458/VEsE/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/sign-on-stand-up-for-workers-rights-?source=tr") **Don't listen to the spin. This decision wasn't about "free speech" -- it was about busting unions.** How do we know? Because the billionaires and corporate interests behind the case have openly admitted it. The State Policy Network (SPN), a nationwide network of billionaire-backed right-wing think tanks, told donors one of its main goals was to "defund and defang" unions, according to _The Guardian_. Early this year, _The Washington Post_ reported that the Koch Brothers, flush with cash from the Trump tax cut, had pledged to spend $400 million to "break" teachers unions. **There's no doubt that billionaires like Donald Trump, Betsy DeVos, and the Koch Brothers are jumping for joy at this decision.** The best way to take the wind out of their sails is to send a clear message -- whether you're in a union or not, we all stand together for stronger workers' rights...and AGAINST the well-funded forces that want to pull us apart. [Add your name to stand with workers now >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92c3/5486deaa/29d84343/dcc6d2f/998203458/VEsF/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/sign-on-stand-up-for-workers-rights-?source=tr") Thank you for your support, \-- Congressman Tim Ryan and Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur

* * *

Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.

body:
I’m sure you’ve seen the stream of endorsements coming in for Leah in the past few weeks. Today, I am excited to add my name to the list, and throw...

Friend,

I’m sure you’ve seen the stream of endorsements coming in for Leah in the past few weeks. Today, I am excited to add my name to the list, and throw my support behind Leah Vukmir.

[JOIN ME](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c6ff6ba2e9944b2494cb8989a7c98241&_e=aHFHVNjN1gqoEAZGHLX5LfD21u1D7X4hgrd0HBI7lecIZm8UxNMN7coLJTb2qba_cvnEY0BpLuUOpEUiOewixTD2TGeDkE1dQ3X_PEvdua_LODr-4qT-78JsxYpn0WCgZ9szcjS3HsRLuCG3DnkVIOwnV98TGrM1fL7gXGGOYTo3dDtEf3OYgOY9W5Yys1HAfCrar5qHoJAJo_X03OWbS-5AWkwIiZczHEiRW57bviqtbP1qZJ4tJrOvok2ZTVNC3PreOUucuvD1w-TtQCwvyIOTpUJ-ceteS-5R8r1_fg3nt_CIrLwc4RSOvITaJJeMYz25p4De80kfCqNLR9bO6M0sj8LyX-kgQt1rP7OhXgrk_u3n993ejt_wUraCWsyWw38Gq8SfvZ_ggfpDELVrVTYNqKvIXmVLtF8ffb_v80Q%3D)
---

I don’t do this lightly, Friend. You see, Leah and I go way back. We served together in the State Senate, and we stood shoulder-to-shoulder together with Gov. Walker to pass Act 10.

When you go through a fight like that with someone, you get a true sense of that person’s character. **I know that when the doors are closed, Leah will not be a door mat. She will fight for us.**

I can tell you, Leah has the drive and dedication to finally balance our federal budget, get more people off food stamps and into family-supporting jobs, and defund Planned Parenthood.

That’s why I’m endorsing her today, and why I’m asking you to join me in supporting her campaign: **[https://leahvukmir.com/endorse-leah/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c6ff6ba2e9944b2494cb8989a7c98241&_e=aHFHVNjN1gqoEAZGHLX5LfD21u1D7X4hgrd0HBI7lecIZm8UxNMN7coLJTb2qba_cvnEY0BpLuUOpEUiOewixTD2TGeDkE1dQ3X_PEvdua_LODr-4qT-78JsxYpn0WCgZ9szcjS3HsRLuCG3DnkVIOwnV98TGrM1fL7gXGGOYTo3dDtEf3OYgOY9W5Yys1HAbSsmHfnl3WJxwDclZmf1ivc2ifBv8sfKP5Jp54drF4dVmjCdPImejORsPivZmPGX2k-4V7CLZIay-LeMIsK07lRAJf_0Spmajz7WG9JQHvhiu3c4oKxLyvqCFJqgTixg6Clk-U4-OWbyDNpFr0WZK-WuBRQyFwbIA8fDKry9ASbilDKAZe_Mzo6Yx9T4owuOYz9tJ8zTI9XQ9h5p-JR1Mks1FWSIS71Q7Yid39AB5nk%3D)**

And, Friend, Leah needs your help right now.

She needs you on her team.

We have a shot at beating Senator Baldwin, but we need to help Leah spread her conservative vision throughout Wisconsin. And we need to do it fast.

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c6ff6ba2e9944b2494cb8989a7c98241&_e=aHFHVNjN1gqoEAZGHLX5LfD21u1D7X4hgrd0HBI7lecIZm8UxNMN7coLJTb2qba_cvnEY0BpLuUOpEUiOewixTD2TGeDkE1dQ3X_PEvdua_LODr-4qT-78JsxYpn0WCgZ9szcjS3HsRLuCG3DnkVIOwnV98TGrM1fL7gXGGOYTo3dDtEf3OYgOY9W5Yys1HAKKTs95WDHR9eZZWonJet2DDGq9LI9CmGFtg77LBHUx4CGT55E9FQc-jF4XW0Tks_AJ9jpD41Exdzf9n-kV0aylB2iLR7Y1Y0Ns8YzG7rusWB1M6HoTpAtfVZcwU0GOlcYYobSJC35kPaQhYjLVq2XqgWMkZVvR1h2njes-nzATsLAiX0XO4yJWXnlCQbx4kNyx_PId_P5Vk5zrbQ39Pe8V4YKelcf51OW-fbiECnpLs%3D)

Leah is counting on you, and so am I – because all of Wisconsin needs Leah in the U.S. Senate.

Glenn

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c6ff6ba2e9944b2494cb8989a7c98241&_e=aHFHVNjN1gqoEAZGHLX5LVk1v6QBrG1jl4BvXl8OJaAjuKmwV8Ci7oOLa3e7WglLfC-dj_7t8Fnwkdj0GpvDESWCvAAy51GfG6v4BV9-__mOhH60yGuXhXzBb040qwCiH75U__R8fOe-8NYwiqL41GbqMFnhiqSHaMpR_Ds_7hv04bepZZO59CEgx8bILuuEGatc8liib7LR0HqWe5acAT-prTEKvt2uzVSKhD_hbGzwjnJf4SQmreqQwEqnQrbWYV5-BHLwdPE0qQl35iJnAg%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c6ff6ba2e9944b2494cb8989a7c98241&_e=aHFHVNjN1gqoEAZGHLX5LTQPh7U2xO5sFHCVvNSxp23tnimWl0hYj-nEGzdRjNb4wfnG-6-wNfwBcBMG9qEmj1I62Ic0P2Tcp2MzpVQYRl0wek9vY1qic6Ddo_AWlZank8ZUdpLKe2Nov14Ey-k7pJe7zWmRQs8sBPY21g2_vG2WdjmlKww8Wg1w89GQVWJ1hY9mF7dQDPSIhSHdaqRmFZMjJISXiloq_OvLICfTaSVIFWOwwBtEhNcNfUJ_GrpYju68rkI3Vx0WovsuQIXrsw%3D%3D)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c6ff6ba2e9944b2494cb8989a7c98241&_e=silgs2ypRPIDol0uM4SKLoti4XStYwALCCW7rOjT0XLrKQX5hmUbPKam0sg8jLYSlOKYKUqu2YFYYCC-hCaTRMJyPotCoH7esXLXx6Tz3j5zdJ0CT_ZYA5G7usa1mlNI5a7xqhFFMNhAC8kyL_RSTxMtdSIBCWOOtGvrOnYBlaYafuM7XQKh8c6Ulzg2tt9lHGitxk8A4YTYTQY_uk3TG0l8ScliP46WlNlyxAkxdb5k9GgPY8f7nJLNwxFB3m4S). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c6ff6ba2e9944b2494cb8989a7c98241&_e=aHFHVNjN1gqoEAZGHLX5LSXH21Q-TIQtzW1xrteOBqiD1Gsai2QTxbrR9GtLxHkqSQyZeakrjW78c2B6BX55NLE3yMI-IIdWBOtSS55e5tPi9zXoboPHx4qMV1-bOlf7_sv0zA9fPH0UqjFTl64ISf1bUfouO4OxROOszg5LbvVrT0bOx5Jj1Ap-XdC_kH-jP-Squ6sQxkD0tVqbWTgIeBkBtor6MEP5LHqXTXjVVmHxGmrHQvxk1oFxjSPk3SvZ4wyAsQtHY_NUAJDGJ5qrXb7ltF90vXR6-LESl0o5d--lVj2y1w1vLOKcjAn1Pg5Sov0RfsMBdWcoiL4terYZZGrylFaQatgp-apXhavcRFqkL4FqiK-HsROqspjEqhjk) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c6ff6ba2e9944b2494cb8989a7c98241&_e=aHFHVNjN1gqoEAZGHLX5LSXH21Q-TIQtzW1xrteOBqjRYpEiHqD4hlRSodwvYX6qBq7JDXcGZ5aOQqx_Ss4TfSb7enf67gjRxIL7Rf39B9uE3RKQs0_RepcBr07Cz6po8u-6WEm47WMra_G4btz_m0FcGGhQszJJt0w_aRRhjGUxDlSv10GyfTAn9J7bI3ZbEEXyTcG4xdrYrq6ZhSjrP8RuMwmavtCUqtZ-IaPPJ8_c9ROSMU9a1b07YO5p_3s6FDbOG5xHkWTd523A2Ey3u18TTmSMwaCT6sOxCCwP3f7VfvMAAFEDvJKLo3LxwdQWTwbkUonT97eCYBWgX5d8LFNOJU6J8f4Mhb3FwMI933TBh14O51Ab76fjUZP76R-y) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. clean_body: I’m sure you’ve seen the stream of endorsements coming in for Leah in the past few weeks. Today, I am excited to add my name to the list, and throw... Friend, I’m sure you’ve seen the stream of endorsements coming in for Leah in the past few weeks. Today, I am excited to add my name to the list, and throw my support behind Leah Vukmir. I don’t do this lightly, Friend. You see, Leah and I go way back. We served together in the State Senate, and we stood shoulder-to-shoulder together with Gov. Walker to pass Act 10. When you go through a fight like that with someone, you get a true sense of that person’s character. I know that when the doors are closed, Leah will not be a door mat. She will fight for us. I can tell you, Leah has the drive and dedication to finally balance our federal budget, get more people off food stamps and into family-supporting jobs, and defund Planned Parenthood. That’s why I’m endorsing her today, and why I’m asking you to join me in supporting her campaign: And, Friend, Leah needs your help right now. She needs you on her team. We have a shot at beating Senator Baldwin, but we need to help Leah spread her conservative vision throughout Wisconsin. And we need to do it fast. Leah is counting on you, and so am I – because all of Wisconsin needs Leah in the U.S. Senate. Glenn Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: Where I stand on the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
As we wait for President Trump's Supreme Court nominee announcement this evening, I want to be sure that you know where I stand.
First, any nominee for Supreme Court Justice must be committed to protecting all Americans -- including the reproductive rights of women -- not just focused on protecting corporate special interests and the powerful and wealthy few.
[**Will you please sign my petition calling on Senate Republicans to reject any nominee who will not protect the rights of all Americans?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0fe/2a380d31/f37dca4/f1a920/3988457513/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180709_PreSCOTUSnominee?source=e20180709_preSCOTUSnom_6mo&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
I also believe that a strong and independent judiciary that is above politics and willing to stop abuses of power is paramount to our path forward both as individuals and as a country.
Given that the current President routinely disregards democratic norms and expresses antipathy for constitutional safeguards, this is more important than ever before.
Finally, Supreme Court nominees should have broad support from both parties and be able to clear a 60-vote threshold.
**I will say it again. Every single American -- regardless of gender, where we live, our income, or what we look like -- deserves a fair and just Supreme Court.**
[**If you agree, please add your name to urge Senate Republicans to only move forward with a nominee who will protect our rights.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0fe/2a380d31/f37dca4/f1a920/3988457513/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180709_PreSCOTUSnominee?source=e20180709_preSCOTUSnom_6mo&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you.
With every good wish,
Senator Maggie Hassan
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0fe/2a380d31/f37dca4/f1a921/3988457513/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDcwOV9NV0hwcmVTQ09UVVNub21fNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20180709_MWHpreSCOTUSnom_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
